name: Ember Flick
description: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 Fire damage.
cantripUpgrade: The damage increases by 1d6 when you reach levels 5 (2d6), 11 (3d6), and 17 (4d6).

name: Whisper of Shadows
description: You send a flickering shadow across a creature's vision. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have disadvantage on its next attack roll before the end of its next turn.

name: Root Grasp
description: Tendrils of magical vine briefly emerge from the ground to slow a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have its speed reduced by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.

name: Glacial Touch
description: A burst of freezing energy leaps from your hand. Make a melee spell attack against a creature within reach. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 Cold damage.
cantripUpgrade: The damage increases by 1d8 when you reach levels 5 (2d8), 11 (3d8), and 17 (4d8).

name: Void Pulse
description: You channel a pulse of draining energy toward a creature you can see within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 Necrotic damage and cannot regain hit points until the start of your next turn.
cantripUpgrade: The damage increases by 1d10 when you reach levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).

name: Holy Spark
description: A mote of radiant light streaks toward a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d8 Radiant damage.
cantripUpgrade: The damage increases by 1d8 when you reach levels 5 (2d8), 11 (3d8), and 17 (4d8).

name: Static Snap
description: Lightning crackles from your fingertips toward a creature within reach. Make a melee spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 Lightning damage and cannot make opportunity attacks until the start of its next turn.
cantripUpgrade: The damage increases by 1d8 when you reach levels 5 (2d8), 11 (3d8), and 17 (4d8).

name: Verdant Sense
description: You attune briefly to the natural world around you. Until the end of your next turn, you know the direction of the nearest source of fresh water or living plant growth within 1 mile.

name: Arcane Jolt
description: You fire a crackling bolt of raw magical energy at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 Force damage.
cantripUpgrade: The spell creates two bolts at level 5, three bolts at level 11, and four bolts at level 17. You can direct the bolts at the same target or at different ones. Make a separate attack roll for each bolt.

name: Minor Mending
description: You repair a single minor break or tear in an object you touch, such as a cracked gemstone, a snapped twig, or a torn piece of cloth. The repair is complete but leaves a faint seam.

name: Grease Slick
material: a pinch of rendered fat
description: Slippery grease covers the ground in a 10-foot square centered on a point within range for the duration. Each creature standing in the area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. A creature that enters the area or ends its turn there must also succeed on this saving throw.
higherLevelSlot: The area of effect increases by 5 feet in each direction for each spell slot level above 1.

name: Binding Ward
material: a silver thread worth 5+ GP
description: You weave a ward of protective magic around a willing creature you can see within range. Until the spell ends, whenever the warded creature takes damage, it reduces the total by 1d4.
higherLevelSlot: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1.

name: Phantom Stride
description: You create a brief illusory duplicate of yourself that steps in a false direction as you dash the other way. You move up to 15 feet without provoking opportunity attacks.

name: Searing Ray
description: You hurl a concentrated beam of fire at a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 3d8 Fire damage. Flammable objects struck that are not held or worn ignite.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 1.

name: Detect Aura
description: For the duration, you sense the presence of magical auras within 30 feet of you. If you sense a magical aura, you can use your action to see a faint outline around the creature or object bearing it and identify the school of magic involved, if any.

name: Enthrall Voice
description: Your voice takes on a magically compelling quality. Choose one creature that can hear you within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the duration. The charmed creature regards you as a trusted acquaintance. The spell ends if you or your allies deal damage to the target.
higherLevelSlot: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1.

name: Poison Dart
material: a thorn or bone needle
description: You conjure a dart coated in magical venom and hurl it at a creature you can see within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 2d4 Poison damage and must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d4 for each spell slot level above 1.

name: Cryptic Script
material: a vial of ink worth 10+ GP, which the spell consumes
description: You inscribe a message on a surface you touch, invisible to all except a creature you designate when casting. If any other creature reads the message, it sees only meaningless symbols. The inscription glows faintly when the designated reader is within 5 feet.
higherLevelSlot: You can designate one additional reader for each spell slot level above 1.

name: Frost Cage
description: Pillars of ice spring up around a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be restrained until the spell ends. A restrained creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success. The pillars melt if the target takes 10 or more Fire damage in a single turn.
higherLevelSlot: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Mirage Step
description: You teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see, leaving behind a flickering illusion of yourself that lasts until the end of your next turn. Any creature that attacks the illusion realizes it is fake after the attack misses.

name: Stone Skin
material: a pinch of granite dust worth 20+ GP
description: You touch a willing creature. Until the spell ends, the target's skin takes on a faint stony sheen and it gains resistance to Bludgeoning damage.

name: Venom Cloud
description: You conjure a 10-foot-radius sphere of sickly green gas centered on a point within range. The cloud spreads around corners. Each creature that enters the cloud for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 2d8 Poison damage and be poisoned until the start of its next turn. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and is not poisoned.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Mind Spike
description: You drive a needle of psychic energy into the mind of a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on an Intelligence saving throw or take 3d8 Psychic damage and reveal its current location to you, which you know for 1 hour even if the creature moves or becomes hidden.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Revitalizing Touch
description: You lay your hands on a creature and channel restorative energy. The target regains 2d8 + your spellcasting modifier hit points and is cured of any one disease or condition afflicting it.
higherLevelSlot: The healing increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Lightning Lash
description: A whip of crackling lightning extends from your hand in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 6d6 Lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Phantom Horde
description: You fill a 20-foot cube within range with the illusory sounds and sights of a charging mob. Each creature in the area must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be frightened of you for the duration. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

name: Wither and Bloom
material: a withered flower and a fresh seed
description: You invoke both the death and renewal of nature in a 10-foot-radius sphere centered on a point within range. Each creature of your choice in that area takes 5d6 Necrotic damage (Constitution saving throw for half). Then, one creature of your choice in the area regains 2d6 hit points.
higherLevelSlot: The Necrotic damage increases by 1d6 and the healing increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Rune Ward
material: powdered silver worth 25+ GP
description: You inscribe a protective rune on a door, window, or other closed object. The rune is invisible unless detected with detect magic. The ward triggers when a creature of a type you specify attempts to pass through the object, dealing 4d8 Radiant damage to the triggering creature and alerting you mentally no matter the distance.

name: Glimpse Beyond
material: a shard of obsidian mirror worth 50+ GP
description: You open your mind to the distant reaches of the cosmos. For the duration, you can ask one question per minute and receive a one-word answer from an alien intelligence beyond mortal comprehension. The answers are truthful but may be cryptic. Each question after the first requires you to succeed on a DC 12 Intelligence saving throw or gain one level of exhaustion.

name: Tempest Burst
description: A violent concussive blast of wind and lightning erupts from you. Each creature within 20 feet of you must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 6d8 Thunder damage and 2d8 Lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Creatures that fail are pushed 10 feet away from you.
higherLevelSlot: The Thunder damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 4.

name: Shadow Puppet
material: a fragment of bone from an undead creature
description: You animate the shadow of a corpse within range as a shadowy servant under your control. The servant uses the statistics of a Shadow (see the Monster Manual) and acts on your initiative. When the spell ends or the servant drops to 0 hit points, it dissolves into wisps of darkness.
higherLevelSlot: You animate one additional shadow servant for each two spell slot levels above 4.

name: Arcane Eye
material: a scrap of bat wing
description: You create an invisible, magical eye within range that hovers in the air for the duration. You mentally receive visual information from the eye, which has normal vision and darkvision out to 30 feet. The eye can look in every direction. As an action, you can move the eye up to 30 feet in any direction. The eye can pass through openings as small as 1 inch in diameter.

name: Gravity Crush
description: You dramatically intensify the gravity around a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or take 5d10 Bludgeoning damage and fall prone, restrained by crushing gravity until the spell ends. A restrained creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the effect ends.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 4.

name: Soulfire Column
description: A pillar of divine soulfire blazes downward from the heavens onto a point you choose within range. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-tall cylinder centered on that point must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 6d8 Radiant damage and 2d8 Fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
higherLevelSlot: The Radiant damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 5.

name: Mass Hex
description: You curse up to six creatures you can see within range. Each target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be hexed for the duration. A hexed creature has disadvantage on ability checks using one ability score of your choice. Whenever a hexed creature deals damage, it takes 1d6 Necrotic damage.
higherLevelSlot: You can target two additional creatures for each spell slot level above 5.

name: Transmute Stone
description: You choose an area of stone or mud up to 40 feet on a side within range and choose one of the following effects. Stone to Mud: Non-magical rock of any sort in the area becomes thick, flowing mud. If cast on a ceiling, the mud falls and creatures underneath must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 4d8 Bludgeoning damage and be restrained. Mud to Stone: Mud in the area solidifies instantly.

name: Veil of Minds
material: a glass bead worth 10+ GP
description: You weave an illusion so convincing that it anchors itself in the minds of up to five creatures you can see within range. Each target must succeed on an Intelligence saving throw or believe a false scenario you describe (no more than one paragraph) for the duration. The illusion is entirely mental; the targets see, hear, and feel it as real. Creatures interacting with an illusory object and realizing it is false can repeat the save.

name: Sundering Strike
description: You channel devastating magical force into a melee attack. Make a melee spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 8d10 Force damage and must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed 30 feet away from you and knocked prone. On a failed save, any armor the target wears has its AC bonus reduced by 2 until repaired (minimum +0).
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 6.

name: Curse of Unmaking
material: a piece of a shattered weapon worth 50+ GP, which the spell consumes
description: You place a devastating curse on a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be cursed for the duration. While cursed, the target has vulnerability to all damage types and cannot regain hit points. At the end of each of the target's turns, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

name: Maze of Mirrors
material: a silver-backed mirror worth 100+ GP
description: You conjure a labyrinthine extradimensional space of infinite reflections that traps one creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be banished into the maze. At the end of each of its turns, the target can make a DC 18 Intelligence check to find the exit and return to the space it left.

name: Astral Anchor
material: a chain link of cold iron worth 100+ GP
description: You tether a creature you can see within range to its current plane of existence. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be unable to use any form of teleportation or planar travel for the duration. Additionally, any spell or ability that would move the creature against its will requires a successful Charisma saving throw to take effect.
higherLevelSlot: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 7.

name: Prismatic Torrent
description: A cascading torrent of prismatic light pours from your outstretched hands in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw. Roll 2d4 for each creature to determine which two colors strike it, applying each effect separately: 1 Red (6d6 Fire damage), 2 Orange (6d6 Acid damage), 3 Yellow (6d6 Lightning damage), 4 Green (6d6 Poison damage). On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage.
higherLevelSlot: The damage of each color increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 7.

name: Soul Cage
material: a tiny silver cage worth 100+ GP
description: You attempt to trap the soul of a creature as it dies. When a creature you can see within range is reduced to 0 hit points, you can use your reaction to trap its soul in the silver cage. The trapped soul can answer questions you pose to it as if it were alive. You can use the soul in this way a number of times equal to your spellcasting modifier. Once those uses are expended, the soul is freed.

name: Worldshatter
material: a shard of a destroyed magical item worth 500+ GP
description: You violently unmake the ground in a 60-foot-radius circle centered on a point you choose within range. The area becomes difficult terrain for the duration. Each creature in the area when the spell is cast or that enters it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 4d10 Bludgeoning damage and fall prone. At the start of each of your turns, the earth heaves again, and all creatures in the area must repeat the saving throw.

name: Eternal Slumber
material: a black lotus petal worth 500+ GP, which the spell consumes
description: You invoke a deep and dreamless slumber upon a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or fall into a magical sleep and remain unconscious for the duration. The sleeping creature cannot be awakened by nonmagical means. Each time the target takes damage, it can repeat the saving throw, waking on a success.

name: Void Gate
material: a gemstone worth 1000+ GP, which the spell consumes
description: You tear open a swirling rift to the void in a 10-foot-radius sphere centered on a point within range. Each creature in the area when the rift opens must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pulled 20 feet toward the center of the rift and take 4d10 Force damage. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and is not pulled. The rift persists and creatures that start their turn within 30 feet of the rift must repeat the saving throw.

name: Absolute Dominion
description: You exert overwhelming mental dominion over up to three creatures you can see within range. Each target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be charmed by you for the duration, treating you as their absolute authority and obeying any command you give that does not require them to harm themselves. A creature can repeat the saving throw each time it takes damage.

name: Cataclysm
material: a diamond worth 5000+ GP, which the spell consumes
description: You unleash a catastrophic surge of elemental devastation centered on a point you can see within range. All creatures within a 60-foot-radius sphere must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 10d10 Fire damage, 10d10 Thunder damage, and 10d10 Lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The area is reduced to rubble; all structures within the radius are destroyed.

name: True Unmaking
material: an obsidian skull worth 5000+ GP, which the spell consumes
description: You speak the words of absolute ending at a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, if the target has 100 hit points or fewer, it dies outright. If it has more than 100 hit points, it takes 12d10 Necrotic damage. On a successful save, the target takes 6d10 Necrotic damage. Creatures killed this way can only be restored to life by a Wish spell.

name: Eternal Bastion
material: a platinum holy symbol worth 2500+ GP
description: You surround yourself with an impenetrable shell of divine and arcane force. For the duration, you are immune to all damage, cannot be moved against your will, and all conditions affecting you are suspended. Any creature that deals damage to you or attempts to forcibly move you must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or take 6d10 Force damage and be stunned until the end of its next turn.
